lines.english: Did the doctors find out how the woman died?
lines.chinese: 医生们查出这名妇女是怎么死的了吗？
lines.raw: Did the doctors find out how the woman died? | 医生们查出这名妇女是怎么死的了吗？

lines.english: The mummy of an Egyptian woman who died in 800 B.C. has just had an operation.
lines.chinese: 一具死于公元前800年的埃及妇女木乃伊刚刚接受了一次手术。
lines.raw: The mummy of an Egyptian woman who died in 800 B.C. has just had an operation. | 一具死于公元前800年的埃及妇女木乃伊刚刚接受了一次手术。

lines.english: The mummy is that of Shepenmut who was once a singer in the Temple of Thebes.
lines.chinese: 这具木乃伊是谢芬姆特的，她曾是底比斯神庙里的一名歌手。
lines.raw: The mummy is that of Shepenmut who was once a singer in the Temple of Thebes. | 这具木乃伊是谢芬姆特的，她曾是底比斯神庙里的一名歌手。

lines.english: As there were strange marks on the X-ray plates taken of the mummy,
lines.chinese: 由于对这具木乃伊X光片上有一些奇怪的印记，
lines.raw: As there were strange marks on the X-ray plates taken of the mummy, | 由于对这具木乃伊X光片上有一些奇怪的印记，

lines.english: doctors have been trying to find out whether the woman died of a rare disease.
lines.chinese: 医生们一直在设法弄清这名妇女是否死于一种罕见的疾病。
lines.raw: doctors have been trying to find out whether the woman died of a rare disease. | 医生们一直在设法弄清这名妇女是否死于一种罕见的疾病。

lines.english: The only way to do this was to operate.
lines.chinese: 唯一的方法就是进行手术。
lines.raw: The only way to do this was to operate. | 唯一的方法就是进行手术。

lines.english: The operation, which lasted for over four hours,
lines.chinese: 手术持续了四个多小时，
lines.raw: The operation, which lasted for over four hours, | 手术持续了四个多小时，

lines.english: proved to be very difficult because of the hard resin which covered the skin.
lines.chinese: 由于木乃伊的皮肤上覆盖着坚硬的树脂，手术做起来非常困难。
lines.raw: proved to be very difficult because of the hard resin which covered the skin. | 由于木乃伊的皮肤上覆盖着坚硬的树脂，手术做起来非常困难。

lines.english: The doctors removed a section of the mummy and sent it to a laboratory.
lines.chinese: 医生们取走了木乃伊的一小块，并把它送到了实验室。
lines.raw: The doctors removed a section of the mummy and sent it to a laboratory. | 医生们取走了木乃伊的一小块，并把它送到了实验室。

lines.english: They also found something which the X-ray plates did not show: a small wax figure of the god Duamutef.
lines.chinese: 他们还发现了一些X光片上没有显示出来的东西：一个小的、蜡制的杜穆特夫神像。
lines.raw: They also found something which the X-ray plates did not show: a small wax figure of the god Duamutef. | 他们还发现了一些X光片上没有显示出来的东西：一个小的、蜡制的杜穆特夫神像。

lines.english: This god which has the head of a cow was normally placed inside a mummy.
lines.chinese: 这个长着牛头的神像通常被放置在木乃伊里面。
lines.raw: This god which has the head of a cow was normally placed inside a mummy. | 这个长着牛头的神像通常被放置在木乃伊里面。

lines.english: The doctors have not yet decided how the woman died.
lines.chinese: 医生们尚未确定这名妇女是如何死亡的。
lines.raw: The doctors have not yet decided how the woman died. | 医生们尚未确定这名妇女是如何死亡的。

lines.english: They feared that the mummy would fall to pieces when they cut it open,
lines.chinese: 他们担心当他们切开木乃伊时，它会碎裂，
lines.raw: They feared that the mummy would fall to pieces when they cut it open, | 他们担心当他们切开木乃伊时，它会碎裂，

lines.english: but fortunately this has not happened.
lines.chinese: 但幸运的是，这种情况并没有发生。
lines.raw: but fortunately this has not happened. | 但幸运的是，这种情况并没有发生。

lines.english: The mummy successfully survived the operation.
lines.chinese: 这具木乃伊成功地经受住了这次手术。
lines.raw: The mummy successfully survived the operation. | 这具木乃伊成功地经受住了这次手术。
